name: Roll Player - The Board Game
short_description: Create the ultimate Fantasy character by rolling dice, building attributes, purchasing weapons, gaining skills, and discovering character traits in Roll Player, a digital adaptation of a popular board game of dice manipulation and strategy!
detailed_description:
Roll Player is a digital adaptation of a dice manipulation, strategy board game where you will compete to create the greatest fantasy character in the role-playing world!

Roll and draft dice to build up your character’s attributes!
Purchase weapons and armor to outfit your hero!
Gain skills and discover your hero’s traits to prepare them for their journey.

Earn Reputation Stars by constructing the perfect character. The player with the greatest Reputation wins the game and will surely triumph over whatever nefarious plot lies ahead!

At the beginning of the game, each player is assigned a random RPG class, alignment and a backstory. Through a series of puzzle-like dice manipulations, a player optimizes their character's attributes and attempts to maximize their alignment and backstory points. Earned gold is used to purchase various skills, traits, weapons and armor in the market phase of each turn. The game ends with a fully created character sheet of an RPG character and the player whose character has the most reputation points wins the game. The best character sheets are stored in the Hall of Heroes.

FEATURES:
- Cross-platform online multiplayer!
- Private online games with friends
- Synced progress across all your devices. Play online game on one device, continue on another!
- Play against 5 levels of AI (or multiple AIs!)
- Local multiplayer with friends on the same device or with Steam Remote Play
- Challenge yourself in Solo mode
- Keep a record of your best heroes, recent games and various stats
- Interactive tutorial - Play and learn!

LANGUAGE:
English

AWARDS & HONORS:
2022 Golden Geek Best Board Game App Runner Up
2016 Golden Geek Most Innovative Board Game Nominee

© 2023 Mipmap, under license from Thunderworks Games, LLC.
Roll Player © 2016 Thunderworks Games, LLC.
